CustomDataType.description: This class does not get 'AdditionalProperties = false' in the schema generation, so it can be extended with arbitrary JSON properties to allow adding custom data.

PublishFirmwareStatusEnumType.description:
This contains the progress status of the publishfirmware
installation.

location.description: Required if status is Published. Can be multiple URI’s, if the Local Controller supports e.g. HTTP, HTTPS, and FTP.

requestId.description:
The request id that was
provided in the
PublishFirmwareRequest which
triggered this action.
